name: German Soup Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the water to the soup meat and season to taste, then cook slowly for several hours.
2. About 30 minutes before serving, prepare the soup balls by mixing the salt and flour in a bowl. Gradually add the butter.
3. In another bowl, beat the eggs and stir them into the flour mixture until combined.
4. Add the milk gradually, using just enough to create a thin batter that can be spooned into the broth.
5. Spoonfuls of the batter into the boiling hot soup, cooking for 10 minutes.
6. Serve immediately in the hot soup.
